_note: Reference compositions from the Mythag Compendium Meta Team Comp doc and Cheri's New Player Handbook. The lead/core unit is included in each 4-stack; 'Alternates' are swap-in suggestions, not part of the four. All IDs verified against SKeyDB. Validated: every team is 4 unique awakeners spanning at most 2 distinct realms total (Chaos counts toward that cap).

teams.name: Kathigu-Ra — Ultra (Chaos+Ultra)
teams.notes: Kathigu-Ra DPS with Ultra support (Clementine/Horla weakness+vulnerable+Ultra access, Tinct buffs). Realm: CHAOS+ULTRA. Alternates (swap-ins if missing pieces): Ryker, Karen, Castor. Source: Mythag Compendium Meta Team Comp.

teams.name: Kathigu-Ra — Pure Chaos
teams.notes: Kathigu-Ra DPS in pure Chaos — exalt/posse spam with aliemus from Karen and "24". Realm: CHAOS. Alternates (swap-ins if missing pieces): Ryker. Source: Mythag Compendium Meta Team Comp.

teams.name: Kathigu-Ra — Aequor (Chaos+Aequor)
teams.notes: Kathigu-Ra DPS with tentacle/Aequor support and Chaos filler. Realm: CHAOS+AEQUOR. Alternates (swap-ins if missing pieces): Hameln, Ryker. Source: Mythag Compendium Meta Team Comp.

teams.name: Mouchette — Caro (Chaos+Caro)
teams.notes: Mouchette hypercarry; Helot (core) feeds Strikes for her Pursuit triggers, Ramona cycles, Hameln debuffs. Realm: CHAOS+CARO. Alternates (swap-ins if missing pieces): Ryker, Alva, Faint, Ogier. Source: Mythag Compendium Meta Team Comp.

teams.name: Mouchette — Ultra (Chaos+Ultra)
teams.notes: Mouchette hypercarry with Ultra support (weak/vuln, multihit crit buffs). Realm: CHAOS+ULTRA. Alternates (swap-ins if missing pieces): Hameln, Ogier, Ryker, Casiah. Source: Mythag Compendium Meta Team Comp.

teams.name: Mouchette — Pure Chaos
teams.notes: Mouchette hypercarry in pure Chaos. Realm: CHAOS. Alternates (swap-ins if missing pieces): Ryker, Ogier. Source: Mythag Compendium Meta Team Comp.

teams.name: Mouchette — user's team (Chaos+Caro)
teams.notes: User's Mouchette team: Helot feeds Strikes, Thais premium embryo/aliemus/copy support, Faint Death Resistance sustain. Realm: CHAOS+CARO. Source: user.

teams.name: Tawil — Pure Chaos (Monowil)
teams.notes: Tawil pure-Chaos carry ("Monowil") — aliemus/keyflare engine for endless exalts. Realm: CHAOS. Alternates (swap-ins if missing pieces): Ramona: Timeworn, Ogier, Ramona. Source: Mythag Compendium Meta Team Comp.

teams.name: Tawil — Aequor (Chaos+Aequor)
teams.notes: Tawil carry with Aequor tentacle support and Chaos filler. Realm: CHAOS+AEQUOR. Alternates (swap-ins if missing pieces): Nautila, Murphy. Source: Mythag Compendium Meta Team Comp.

teams.name: Tawil — %HP Build (Chaos+Caro)
teams.notes: Tawil %Max-HP scaling build leaning on Caro sustain. Realm: CHAOS+CARO. Source: Mythag Compendium Meta Team Comp.

teams.name: Pollux — Pure Ultra
teams.notes: Pollux scaling combo DPS (core Castor) with Ultra weak/vuln support. Realm: ULTRA. Alternates (swap-ins if missing pieces): Tinct, Winkle, Hameln. Source: Mythag Compendium Meta Team Comp.

teams.name: Pollux — Caro (Ultra+Caro)
teams.notes: Pollux DPS supported by a Caro core (Aigis + Thais cores, Leigh heals). Realm: CARO+ULTRA. Ultra mixed with Aequor/Caro — 25% reduction to all Ultra-Turn effects (Annihilation unaffected). Alternates (swap-ins if missing pieces): Castor, Clementine, Horla. Source: Mythag Compendium Meta Team Comp.

teams.name: Pollux — Aequor (Ultra+Aequor)
teams.notes: Pollux DPS with Aequor support and Celeste revive. Realm: AEQUOR+ULTRA. Ultra mixed with Aequor/Caro — 25% reduction to all Ultra-Turn effects (Annihilation unaffected). Source: Mythag Compendium Meta Team Comp.

teams.name: Castor — Caro (Ultra+Caro)
teams.notes: Castor stall/shield DPS with Agrippa alert-stacking and Caro sustain. Realm: CARO+ULTRA. Ultra mixed with Aequor/Caro — 25% reduction to all Ultra-Turn effects (Annihilation unaffected). Alternates (swap-ins if missing pieces): Clementine, Jenkin, Erica, Wanda. Source: Mythag Compendium Meta Team Comp.

teams.name: Castor — Pure Ultra
teams.notes: Castor shield/Corrosion DPS in pure Ultra with Erica/Clementine support and Jenkin crit buffs. Realm: ULTRA. Alternates (swap-ins if missing pieces): Alva, Pollux, Hameln. Source: Mythag Compendium Meta Team Comp.

teams.name: Helot: Catena — Caro core
teams.notes: Catena multihit Caro DPS with Thais (embryo/copy), Aigis (vuln) and Helot (Strike feed). Realm: CARO. Alternates (swap-ins if missing pieces): Horla, Celeste, Salvador, Clementine. Source: Mythag Compendium Meta Team Comp.

teams.name: Doresain — Caro core
teams.notes: Doresain Corpse-stacking DPS; Pickman builds STR, Thais enables embryo/copies, Faint sustains. Realm: CARO. Alternates (swap-ins if missing pieces): Casiah, Clementine, Salvador. Source: Mythag Compendium Meta Team Comp.

teams.name: Murphy: Fauxborn — Lemurian (Astral Reign only)
teams.notes: All-Lemurian GMurphy team; Soulforge scales with 3 other Lemurians (max HP/shield). Arc-2 only — Lemurian Soulforge is inert in Faded Legacy. Realm: AEQUOR. Alternates (swap-ins if missing pieces): Faros, Thais, Murphy. Source: Mythag Compendium Meta Team Comp.

teams.name: Murphy: Fauxborn — Discard (Aequor+Ultra)
teams.notes: Discard/Aftershock GMurphy team with Corposant pilots and Aurita multihit. Realm: AEQUOR+ULTRA. Ultra mixed with Aequor/Caro — 25% reduction to all Ultra-Turn effects (Annihilation unaffected). Source: Mythag Compendium Meta Team Comp.

teams.name: Murphy: Fauxborn — Arc 1
teams.notes: GMurphy team that doesn't rely on Lemurian Soulforge (better for Arc 1); base Murphy reduces self-inflicted Sacrifice. Realm: CARO+AEQUOR. Alternates (swap-ins if missing pieces): Tulu. Source: Mythag Compendium Meta Team Comp.

teams.name: Corposant — Aequor core (Aequor+Ultra)
teams.notes: Corposant discard/shield support-DPS with Aurita multihit, Casiah card draw, GMurphy. Realm: AEQUOR+ULTRA. Ultra mixed with Aequor/Caro — 25% reduction to all Ultra-Turn effects (Annihilation unaffected). Alternates (swap-ins if missing pieces): Murphy, Tulu, Clementine, Tinct. Source: Mythag Compendium Meta Team Comp.

teams.name: Doll: Inferno — Poison (Chaos+Caro)
teams.notes: GDoll poison applier with Nymphaea instant triggers and Faint sustain. Realm: CHAOS+CARO. Alternates (swap-ins if missing pieces): Xu, Agrippa. Source: Mythag Compendium Meta Team Comp.

teams.name: Liz — Chaos (Ultra+Chaos)
teams.notes: Liz poison DPS with Chaos poison support and Clementine Ultra buffs. Realm: CHAOS+ULTRA. Source: Mythag Compendium Meta Team Comp.

teams.name: Liz — Caro (Ultra+Caro)
teams.notes: Liz poison DPS with Xu poison triggers and Salvador sustain. Realm: CARO+ULTRA. Ultra mixed with Aequor/Caro — 25% reduction to all Ultra-Turn effects (Annihilation unaffected). Source: Mythag Compendium Meta Team Comp.

teams.name: Daffodil — Ultra (Ultra+Chaos)
teams.notes: Daffodil burst DPS with Ultra weak/vuln support and Lily defensive Chaos filler. Realm: CHAOS+ULTRA. Source: Mythag Compendium Meta Team Comp.

teams.name: Hypercarry (Chaos+Caro)
teams.notes: Classic hypercarry: three supports around one carry (Mouchette), Caro-leaning. Realm: CHAOS+CARO. Source: Cheri New Player Handbook.

teams.name: Stall (Ultra+Caro)
teams.notes: Stall archetype: Castor shields, Agrippa permanent alert, Leigh heals, Erica alert/weakness. Realm: CARO+ULTRA. Ultra mixed with Aequor/Caro — 25% reduction to all Ultra-Turn effects (Annihilation unaffected). Source: Cheri New Player Handbook.

teams.name: Poison (Chaos+Caro)
teams.notes: Poison archetype: Xu applies/triggers, Nymphaea instant trigger, GDoll aliemus/weakness, Faint sustain. Realm: CHAOS+CARO. Source: Cheri New Player Handbook.

teams.name: Counter (Chaos+Aequor)
teams.notes: Counter archetype: Caecus stacks counter, Nautila multiplies/AOEs it, Tawil/Hameln STR + debuffs. Realm: CHAOS+AEQUOR. Source: Cheri New Player Handbook.

teams.name: Sorel — Caro core
teams.notes: Sorel greedy multihit Exalt DPS; Pickman builds/buffs her Exalt via temp STR, Thais embryo/aliemus, Leigh heals at low HP. Realm: CARO. Source: Cheri New Player Handbook.

teams.name: Sorel — Caro alt
teams.notes: Sorel with Thais embryo/copies, Aigis vuln/petrify, Faint Death Resistance. Realm: CARO. Source: Cheri New Player Handbook.

teams.name: Saya — Propagation Caro
teams.source: Beginner Guide to Caro + Character Guide
teams.notes: Mono-Caro Propagation team. Saya stacks Corrosion, funnels Aliemus and seeds 0-cost card copies that supercharge Sorel's Exalt; Thais embryo support, Faint sustain. Realm: CARO. Source: Beginner Guide to Caro + Character Guide.

teams.name: Vortice — Divine Aequor
teams.notes: Mono-Aequor. Vortice ramping AOE DPS (needs Drowned Innocence posse + Reload!/soulforge); defensive Aequor teammates stall while she ramps, Celeste revive. Realm: AEQUOR. Source: Cheri New Player Handbook.

teams.name: Arachne — Singularity Ultra
teams.notes: Mono-Ultra. Arachne Singularity carry with Daffodil/Castor and Jenkin crit buffs. Realm: ULTRA. Source: Cheri New Player Handbook.
